definitions: Items or quantities that are similar in function, form, or composition to a larger, more substantial, or mass-produced version.
The larger, often more common or standard, versions of something that is being compared, especially when discussing smaller, specialized, or miniature versions.
examples: These miniature components perform the same function as their bulk counterparts.
The efficiency of the new material was tested against its bulk counterparts.
Researchers compared the properties of the nanoparticles with their bulk counterparts.
